canonical_definition: Fine-tuning approach using Low-Rank Adaptation applied to the language model component of vision-language models, with variants including standard, data-augmented, and Chain-of-Thought supervised training.
papers: Are Vision-Language Models Safe in the Wild? A Meme-Based Benchmark Study
ToM: Leveraging Tree-orientedMapReduce for Long-Context Reasoning in Large Language Models
